meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Basic App Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to implement professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress clients and scale your freelance dev.
content.answer_block: Transform your basic apps into high-value SaaS products by implementing context-aware user onboarding. By integrating interactive walkthroughs and personalized setup flows, you increase user retention and perceived value. Use Antigravity to scaffold the UI and Claude Code to automate the backend event-tracking logic, ensuring a seamless, professional experience.
content.intro:
The graveyard of freelance development is filled with 'basic' apps—functional codebases that failed to capture user attention because they lacked a bridge between installation and value. Clients don't pay for code; they pay for outcomes, and without a guided onboarding flow, your users are lost in the dark the moment they sign up.

It is time to stop shipping static dashboards and start engineering experiences. By leveraging automated onboarding, you turn a complex interface into a guided journey, increasing client satisfaction and your billable rate. Let’s refactor your workflow to prioritize user success from the first click.

steps.title: Define the User Success Path
steps.description: Map the shortest route from sign-up to the 'Aha!' moment. Use this to structure your onboarding steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a user onboarding flow schema that guides a new user from registration to their first core action in a SaaS dashboard. Include steps for profile setup, feature tour, and initial configuration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Analyze the current codebase and suggest a state-management structure for a 3-step onboarding wizard.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Rapidly build the modal or slide-over components using Antigravity to ensure a clean, responsive design.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable React modal component for onboarding that supports progress tracking, back/next navigation, and a dismissible state.

steps.title: Implement Event Tracking
steps.description: Hook into user actions to trigger onboarding steps conditionally based on backend data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a TypeScript hook that tracks user progress through the onboarding flow and updates the database via API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file ./src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --instruction 'Implement logic to sync onboarding progress to the user profile table in Supabase.'

steps.title: Build Context-Aware Tooltips
steps.description: Create non-intrusive guides that highlight features as the user navigates the dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a tooltip component that anchors to specific dashboard elements and triggers based on user interaction history.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --path ./src/components/FeatureTooltip.tsx --instruction 'Use Framer Motion for smooth entrance animations.'

steps.title: Automate Onboarding Completion Logic
steps.description: Finalize the flow by cleaning up state and redirecting the user to the main workspace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a function to finalize the onboarding state, update user status, and push a welcome notification to the user.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Refactor the final step of the onboarding flow to ensure seamless transition to the main dashboard without layout shift.'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Skip' button. Forcing onboarding reduces conversion for power users.
Use local storage to save progress so users can resume onboarding if they refresh the page.
Make your onboarding data-driven; log which step users drop off at to identify UI friction points.
Use a 'Progress Bar' at the top of the onboarding modal to provide a sense of momentum.
Personalize the onboarding copy based on the user's role or industry selected during sign-up.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, perform a user testing session, and analyze your drop-off rates using your newly implemented tracking events.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn any basic app into a premium, high-converting product. Stop building in isolation and start shipping features that retain users. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
